title: Cough / cold
source_review_basis: committed exact-section summaries and evidence records; full guideline documents were not retained for this pass

presenting_history.text: Specifies cough duration, quality, timing, risk factors, and associated-symptom history domains.
presenting_history.rationale: Directly supports mapped cough duration, character, timing, risk, and associated-symptom history.
presenting_history.evidence_extract: Specifies cough duration, quality, timing, risk factors, and associated-symptom history domains.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Cough – 46

presenting_history.text: Identifies severity-risk contexts and distinguishes uncomplicated common cold from other respiratory presentations.
presenting_history.rationale: Supports common-cold symptom context and pediatric severity caveats.
presenting_history.evidence_extract: Identifies severity-risk contexts and distinguishes uncomplicated common cold from other respiratory presentations.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Common Cold

red_flags.text: Defines DHA telehealth scope, Dubai purpose, licensed-provider applicability, and emergency/controlled-medication exclusions.
red_flags.rationale: Defines the broad Dubai telehealth cough scope and setting limitations.
red_flags.evidence_extract: Defines DHA telehealth scope, Dubai purpose, licensed-provider applicability, and emergency and controlled-medication exclusions.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Cough – 46

red_flags.text: Lists cough features that require serious-condition assessment or face-to-face escalation.
red_flags.rationale: Directly supports mapped breathing, cyanosis, systemic, feeding, and worsening concern prompts.
red_flags.evidence_extract: Lists cough features that require serious-condition assessment or face-to-face escalation.

source_limitations: The URTI/bronchiolitis diagnosis label and bronchiolitis or croup aliases are not treated as supported by the broad cough and common-cold sections.
Examination, chest imaging, medication, saline, hydration, and fixed follow-up content remains unsupported.
The workflow is broader than DHA telehealth setting.
Qualified clinician review has not been completed.
All prior supported legacy-item mappings were removed because canonical item-level applicability and workflow-specific rationale were not present in explicit repository records.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
